mesa 0.99.1
  • Reference

  • Changelog

Add library metrics to the qseaSet sample table

Source: R/alterQset.R
addLibraryInformation.Rd

Append library information to the sampleTable of a qseaSet. Columns are taken from qseaSet@libraries$file_name, and when available, from qseaSet@libraries$input_file (prefixed with "input_"). Existing columns are not duplicated.

addLibraryInformation(qseaSet)

Arguments

qseaSet

qseaSet A qseaSet object containing sequencing data.

Value

A qseaSet object:

  • addLibraryInformation(): returns the same qseaSet with its sampleTable augmented by library-level columns.

Examples

data(exampleTumourNormal, package = "mesa")
qs <- addLibraryInformation(exampleTumourNormal)
head(qsea::getSampleTable(qs))
#>          sample_name    group patient        type tumour tissue age gender
#> Colon1_N    Colon1_N Colon1_N  Colon1 NormalColon Normal  Colon  80      F
#> Colon1_T    Colon1_T Colon1_T  Colon1         CRC Tumour  Colon  80      F
#> Colon2_N    Colon2_N Colon2_N  Colon2 NormalColon Normal  Colon  67      F
#> Colon2_T    Colon2_T Colon2_T  Colon2         CRC Tumour  Colon  67      F
#> Lung1_N      Lung1_N  Lung1_N   Lung1  NormalLung Normal   Lung  64      F
#> Lung1_T      Lung1_T  Lung1_T   Lung1        LUAD Tumour   Lung  64      F
#>          stage qsea_initial_reads qsea_initial_pairs qsea_initial_r1s
#> Colon1_N  <NA>           12692133            6116269           365136
#> Colon1_T   III           22233219           10682235           677941
#> Colon2_N  <NA>           13665557            6502600           486823
#> Colon2_T    IV           17523260            8458460           566689
#> Lung1_N   <NA>           24124310           11812879           459951
#> Lung1_T    IIA           14777077            7199265           346529
#>          qsea_mapq_filtered_pairs qsea_size_filtered_pairs qsea_filtered_r1s
#> Colon1_N                  4139702                  3973684            245156
#> Colon1_T                  8020873                  7651545            505870
#> Colon2_N                  4495478                  4293332            355784
#> Colon2_T                  6233320                  6093846            375273
#> Lung1_N                   8612047                  8246187            301844
#> Lung1_T                   5571896                  5368445            248324
#>          total_fragments valid_fragments library_factor     offset
#> Colon1_N         4218840         3745354      1.0160834 0.08361333
#> Colon1_T         8157415         7428804      0.9149047 0.11792761
#> Colon2_N         4649116         4195483      0.9700701 0.09683869
#> Colon2_T         6469119         5878535      0.9537051 0.04782413
#> Lung1_N          8548031         7747154      1.0365441 0.08932700
#> Lung1_T          5616769         5208468      1.0701382 0.09292399
#>          fragment_median fragment_mean fragment_sd     relH     GoGe
#> Colon1_N             213      218.0500    92.52174 5.567633 2.554300
#> Colon1_T             205      209.9108    87.52641 4.921130 2.425149
#> Colon2_N             209      213.7803    89.08940 5.399262 2.508576
#> Colon2_T             206      211.7649    83.38018 5.686246 2.529553
#> Lung1_N              170      179.5662    77.17606 4.463002 2.235803
#> Lung1_T              169      178.6148    75.22787 4.406991 2.218343
#>          fragments_without_pattern prop_without_pattern initial_reads
#> Colon1_N                    580041                0.137      15094748
#> Colon1_T                   1288747                0.158      26915464
#> Colon2_N                    662701                0.143      16356706
#> Colon2_T                    634997                0.098      20229952
#> Lung1_N                    1408605                0.165      27826064
#> Lung1_T                     915532                0.163      17027817
#>          mapped_reads properly_paired_reads contamination_filtered_reads
#> Colon1_N     14500990              13383100                     15094748
#> Colon1_T     25724228              23594272                     26915464
#> Colon2_N     15582886              14233090                     16356706
#> Colon2_T     19406362              18074018                     20229952
#> Lung1_N      26718181              25564316                     27826064
#> Lung1_T      16328648              15492908                     17027817
#>          dedup_reads prop_final input_qsea_initial_reads
#> Colon1_N    12709013  0.4962460                  4966377
#> Colon1_T    22267932  0.5520101                  8396190
#> Colon2_N    13695862  0.5129985                  4299845
#> Colon2_T    17532815  0.5811714                  7623711
#> Lung1_N     24136005  0.5568272                  6856016
#> Lung1_T     14785786  0.6117599                  4856759
#>          input_qsea_initial_pairs input_qsea_initial_r1s
#> Colon1_N                  2414044                 121574
#> Colon1_T                  4074931                 210013
#> Colon2_N                  2070056                 126214
#> Colon2_T                  3705282                 193860
#> Lung1_N                   3363105                 121186
#> Lung1_T                   2374289                 100993
#>          input_qsea_mapq_filtered_pairs input_qsea_size_filtered_pairs
#> Colon1_N                        2157040                        2022146
#> Colon1_T                        3724523                        3459159
#> Colon2_N                        1883766                        1743989
#> Colon2_T                        3335781                        3154263
#> Lung1_N                         2925108                        2718410
#> Lung1_T                         2088305                        1970134
#>          input_qsea_filtered_r1s input_total_fragments input_valid_fragments
#> Colon1_N                  102865               2125011               2011862
#> Colon1_T                  182440               3641599               3443167
#> Colon2_N                  110753               1854742               1767031
#> Colon2_T                  164778               3319041               3146633
#> Lung1_N                    99141               2817551               2667740
#> Lung1_T                    83585               2053719               1964050
#>          input_library_factor input_offset input_fragment_median
#> Colon1_N                   NA           NA                   159
#> Colon1_T                   NA           NA                   155
#> Colon2_N                   NA           NA                   156
#> Colon2_T                   NA           NA                   155
#> Lung1_N                    NA           NA                   151
#> Lung1_T                    NA           NA                   150
#>          input_fragment_mean input_fragment_sd input_relH input_GoGe
#> Colon1_N            170.1683          74.09937   1.506917  1.0294099
#> Colon1_T            164.6657          70.47221   1.446767  1.0094019
#> Colon2_N            165.8846          71.80015   1.608130  1.0823742
#> Colon2_T            163.3088          66.06211   1.474401  1.0054567
#> Lung1_N             157.6033          63.64548   1.437550  0.9970028
#> Lung1_T             157.5332          62.24685   1.481526  1.0093137
#>          input_fragments_without_pattern input_prop_without_pattern
#> Colon1_N                          564054                      0.265
#> Colon1_T                         1036999                      0.285
#> Colon2_N                          485865                      0.262
#> Colon2_T                          908952                      0.274
#> Lung1_N                           821455                      0.292
#> Lung1_T                           569057                      0.277
#>          input_initial_reads input_mapped_reads input_properly_paired_reads
#> Colon1_N             5432188            5199496                     4939766
#> Colon1_T             9253198            8806330                     8337544
#> Colon2_N             4794944            4521144                     4233954
#> Colon2_T             8310446            7958011                     7583394

#> Lung1_T              5295140            5052777                     4852748
